## Why It Works

If you can get this one right, it's powerful and a great 'expertise builder'. Start by telling people exactly what you're going to show them, then handle a big objection. Then each step must be simple and short so you can read this easily on mobile. Then, wrap it by handling the silly objections you're going to get from people.

## Template

How to get started as a [thing]:
(even if you [objection handler])

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3
4. Step 4
5. Step 5
6. Step 6
7. Step 7

Congrats. You're [outcomes]

P.S. Yes, I understand [most likely silly argument].

## Example

How to get started as a freelance writer:
(even if you have no professional writing experience)

1. Choose your niche
2. Create a portfolio
3. Set up a professional website
4. Join freelancing platforms
5. Network on social media
6. Pitch to potential clients
7. Deliver quality work on time

Congrats. You're now on your way to building a successful freelance writing career.

P.S. Yes, I understand "but I'm not a good enough writer yet." Everyone starts somewhere. Practice and persistence are key.
